title: I am going on a desert walk
subtitle: Chosen Withdrawal; intentional reduction of stimulation to recover clarity
description: An artifact documenting a voluntary movement into a state of less. It marks a shift from endurance-based Desert Faith to chosen withdrawal, prioritizing the reestablishment of signal by lowering environmental noise.

motifMap.symbol: A man sitting by a quiet pool in the desert
motifMap.meaning: Intentional reduction of environment to recover clarity; book unopened signaling pre-meaning.

excerpt: I am going where less is happening.
